description: Log in to Redmine (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and update the status of the issue titled 'Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding on Android 14' in the 'Mobile Application v2' project from 'New' to 'In Progress'. Include a note stating 'Starting investigation. Will test on Android 14 emulator and real device.' and do not change any other fields.
